stemHtml: An applicant who wishes to revalidate his/hers mountain rating shall...

options.a: have completed at least 6 mountain landings in the past 12 months.
options.b: have completed at least 5 mountain landings in the past 24 months.
options.c: have completed at least 5 mountain landings in the past 12 months.
options.d: have completed at least 6 mountain landings in the past 24 months.
